exception_title: Legacy internal load balancer using TLS 1.2
compensating_controls: Endpoint is internal-only behind VPN; no PII data traverses this connection; upgrade to TLS 1.3 scheduled for Q2 2025

exception_title: Temporary 0.0.0.0/0 rule on staging debug port
compensating_controls: Rule restricted to staging VPC only; port 9229 (Node.js debugger); access logged via VPC Flow Logs; 30-day time limit
review_outcome: Expired — debug port rule removed after sprint completion

exception_title: Cross-VPC connectivity between staging and production for ML data sync
compensating_controls: Traffic restricted to specific IP allowlist (10.1.4.0/24 staging ML subnet to 10.0.8.0/24 production data export subnet); all data transmitted through encrypted IPsec tunnel (AES-256); PII fields stripped at production export layer before transmission; comprehensive audit logging of all cross-VPC data transfers with 12-month retention; monthly review of transferred data volumes and access patterns by Security Engineering
review_outcome: Renewed — compensating controls verified effective. Data stripping confirmed via quarterly PII scan. Audit logs reviewed with no anomalies. Extended to 2026-06-05.

exception_title: Redis ElastiCache TLS 1.2 for production cache
compensating_controls: Redis cache does not store PII; session tokens are ephemeral with 15-minute TTL; connection restricted to application tier security group only; upgrade to TLS 1.3 dependent on AWS ElastiCache engine update
review_outcome: Renewed — AWS has not yet released TLS 1.3 support for the current ElastiCache engine version. Extended to 2026-04-05.
